name: Stronger unit and Electron E2E coverage

description: Baseline runner failed because autoresearch run_experiment could not spawn bash

asi.hypothesis: Initial autoresearch setup should establish baseline by listing existing Playwright tests.
asi.error_detail: run_experiment returned 'spawn bash ENOENT' before executing ./autoresearch.sh, despite bash tool working in Git Bash environment.
asi.rollback_reason: No product/test code changes to keep; setup files are preserved by autoresearch tooling.
asi.next_action_hint: Invoke run_experiment through an explicit Windows Git Bash path or cmd-compatible wrapper if supported.

description: Explicit repo bash.cmd shim did not resolve run_experiment bash lookup

asi.hypothesis: A cwd bash.cmd forwarding to Git Bash would satisfy run_experiment's bash spawn on Windows.
asi.error_detail: run_experiment still returned 'spawn bash ENOENT', implying it does not resolve .cmd or current-directory shims for bash.
asi.rollback_reason: No product/test code changes; keep autoresearch setup files only.
asi.next_action_hint: Try an ignored cwd bash.exe copy/symlink to Git Bash, or another way to make a real bash executable visible to Node spawn.

description: Harness rejected custom PowerShell command while autoresearch.sh exists

asi.hypothesis: Use PowerShell directly for Windows-native baseline per user guidance.
asi.error_detail: run_experiment enforces autoresearch.sh when the file exists and refused the custom PowerShell command before running the workload.
asi.rollback_reason: No product/test changes should be kept from a rejected runner invocation.
asi.next_action_hint: Run ./autoresearch.sh, which is now a thin wrapper around autoresearch.ps1.

description: PowerShell wrapper script still blocked by run_experiment bash spawn on Windows

asi.hypothesis: Keeping autoresearch.sh as a thin PowerShell wrapper would satisfy the harness while doing Windows-native work.
asi.error_detail: run_experiment still failed before executing the wrapper with 'spawn bash ENOENT'. The harness itself requires a bash executable to invoke autoresearch.sh.
asi.rollback_reason: No product/test code ran; keep only the autoresearch setup context.
asi.next_action_hint: Provide a local ignored bash.exe shim that redirects autoresearch.sh/checks.sh invocations to the PowerShell scripts, then run ./autoresearch.sh.

description: Local bash.exe PowerShell shim was found but benchmark exited before metrics

asi.hypothesis: A cwd bash.exe shim that dispatches autoresearch.sh to autoresearch.ps1 would let run_experiment work on Windows.
asi.error_detail: run_experiment now found a bash executable but returned exit code 1 after ~5s with no metric output.
asi.rollback_reason: Runner did not produce benchmark metrics; no product/test code changes are valid to keep.
asi.next_action_hint: Instrument the shim to log received args/current directory/output, or install a less restrictive shim that forwards to real Git Bash for non-autoresearch invocations.
